workflow: OpenAI built-in image_gen plus source-backed product composite
background_prompt: Create an empty warm residential living-room corner with a natural-oak sideboard, cream lime-plaster wall, oatmeal linen curtain, soft late-morning window light, and one restrained dark-green ceramic accent. Leave clear grounded surfaces for later placement of exact official product cutouts. Include no electronics, smart-home hardware, screens, text, logos, charts, diagrams, routing lines, panels, frames, floating cards, or progress bars.
product_composite: SwitchBot Hub 2 official transparent product cutout
SwitchBot Hub 3 official transparent product cutout
constraints: no embedded headline or title poster
no chart, graph, or generic AI diagram
no decorative routing, network, or path lines
no translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, or progress bars
warm residential materials with restrained dark-green accent
clear at 16:10 article and 16:9 card crops
